name: Sunrise Food Bank
description: This resource offers food assistance to families in the Madison area.

name: Madison City Schools Foundation
description: Supporting students and teachers across Madison City Schools through grants, scholarships, and educational programs.

name: Crisis Services of North Alabama
description: Providing 24/7 crisis intervention, counseling services, and support for individuals facing mental health emergencies in North Alabama.

name: Decatur Morgan Hospital Community Health
description: Free and low-cost health screenings, wellness programs, and community health education serving Decatur and Morgan County residents.

name: Boys & Girls Clubs of North Alabama
description: After-school and summer programs for youth ages 6-18 including tutoring, sports, arts, and leadership development across multiple locations.
